mapper.select: SELECT rp.runtime_profile_id, rp.profile_key, rp.profile_name, rp.domain_type, rp.provider, rp.model, cc.code_name AS model_name, rp.temperature, rp.top_p, rp.max_tokens, rp.description, rp.revision_no, rp.is_active, rp.created_at, rp.created_id, rp.updated_at, rp.updated_id FROM tb_mst_ai_runtime_profile rp LEFT JOIN tb_common_code cc ON cc.group_id = 'ai_models' AND cc.code_id = rp.model WHERE 1=1 AND rp.is_active = 1 AND rp.is_active = 0 AND rp.domain_type = #{domainType} ORDER BY rp.runtime_profile_id DESC

SELECT runtime_profile_id, profile_key, profile_name, domain_type, provider, model, temperature, top_p, max_tokens, description, revision_no, is_active, created_at, created_id, updated_at, updated_id FROM tb_mst_ai_runtime_profile WHERE runtime_profile_id = #{runtimeProfileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mst_ai_runtime_profile ( profile_key, profile_name, domain_type, provider, model, temperature, top_p, max_tokens, description, revision_no, is_active, created_id, updated_id ) VALUES ( #{profileKey}, #{profileName}, #{domainType}, #{provider}, #{model}, #{temperature}, #{topP}, #{maxTokens}, #{description}, #{revisionNo}, #{isActive}, #{createdId}, #{updatedId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mst_ai_runtime_profile SET profile_name = #{profileName}, domain_type = #{domainType}, provider = #{provider}, model = #{model}, temperature = #{temperature}, top_p = #{topP}, max_tokens = #{maxTokens}, description = #{description}, revision_no = #{revisionNo}, updated_id = #{updatedId} WHERE runtime_profile_id = #{runtimeProfileId}
